section_index: cardio.md §3 VO2max 등급표 / §4 HRmax·Karvonen·5zone / §5 Daniels VDOT 페이스 / §7 엘리트 기록·VO2max

vo2max_elite_by_sport.note: ml/kg/min, 출처: 직접 측정 또는 공신력 있는 추정치 (§7-5)
vo2max_elite_by_sport.crossfit_games_elite_note: Games-level athletes typically VO2max 55-70+ (male); direct measurement data sparse in literature. Fit 20s male 95th percentile = 66.3 (ACSM). Elite endurance sports 70-97 range.

run_pace_thresholds.note: 초 단위. cardio grading 배열 순서: [elite, advanced, rxd, intermediate, beginner] lower bound. 시간은 작을수록 좋음(elite=가장 작은 값).

mile_male_sec.source: grading.py 기존 임계값. 참조: mile WR = 3:43.13 (El Guerrouj 1999, World Athletics T1); sub-4 mile elite amateur ~240s. VDOT 80 → 5K 11:46 → mile ~3:52 추정.

mile_female_sec.source: 추정. Mile WR ♀ = 4:07.64 (Kipyegon 2023). Elite amateur 여성 ~4:30-5:00. ACSM 여성 VO2max 15-20% 낮음.

5k_female_sec.source: 5K WR ♀ = 13:58 (Chebet 2025). ACSM 여성 VO2max offset ~15-20% 적용.

marathon_female_sec.source: Marathon WR ♀ = 2:09:56 (Chepng'etich 2024). ACSM 여성 VO2max offset 적용.

rowing_thresholds.note: 초 단위. [elite, advanced, rxd, intermediate, beginner] lower bound. 작을수록 좋음.

row_500m_male_sec.source: grading.py 기존 임계값. CrossFit Games 수준 1:25-1:30 / RX 1:40-1:50 범위 코치 표준. Concept2 world ranking 참조.

row_500m_female_sec.source: Concept2 rankings 기반 추정. 여성 top splits ~1:30-1:40 세계급, RX+ 여성 1:50-2:00.

row_2km_male_sec.source: grading.py 기존 임계값. Concept2 rankings: 세계급 남성 2K ~5:35-6:00, recreational ~8:00, beginner ~10:00.

cooper_12min_meters.note: 미터 단위. [elite, advanced, rxd, intermediate, beginner] lower bound. 클수록 좋음(elite=가장 큰 값).

male_20s.source: grading.py 기존 임계값. Cooper 식: VO2max = (22.351 × km) - 11.288. 3500m → VO2max≈67.0, 3000m→55.8, 2700m→49.1, 2400m→42.4, 2100m→35.6. ACSM 남성 20s: superior≥66.3 → 3480m 이상. 출처: Cooper KH 1968 JAMA T1, PMC 4314605 T1.

female_20s.source: Cooper 식 적용 + ACSM 여성 VO2max offset(-15%). 3000m→55.8(ACSM 여성 superior≥51.3 충족). 추정치.

vdot_formula.description: Daniels VDOT — pseudo-VO2max. 실제 측정값 아닌 race performance 기반 계산. 출처: Daniels & Gilbert 1979 'Oxygen Power'.
vdot_formula.riegel_formula: T2 = T1 × (D2/D1)^1.06. 5K→10K 정확, marathon까지 +5-10% 보수 보정 권장.

recommended_hrmax_formula.general_male_female: Tanaka 2001: 208 - 0.7 × age (SEE ±7 bpm, meta n=18,712). ACSM 권장.
recommended_hrmax_formula.female_specific: Gulati 2010: 206 - 0.88 × age (n=5,437 여성, Circulation). 여성 전용 시 권장.
recommended_hrmax_formula.legacy: Fox-Haskell 220-age: SEE ±10-15 bpm, 청년 overestimate / 노년 underestimate. 비권장.

hr_zones.karvonen_formula: THR = ((HRmax - HRrest) × %intensity) + HRrest. 1957 Karvonen. ACSM 권장: HRR% ≈ VO2 reserve%로 개인화.
hr_zones.source: Karvonen 1957, ACSM 11th ed., Tanaka 2001, Gulati 2010 — all T1

section_citations.note: 12-min run validation. Cooper 식 VO2max = (22.351 × km) - 11.288.

section_citations.ref: ACSM. Guidelines for Exercise Testing and Prescription, 11th ed. 2021. Table 4.7.
section_citations.note: VO2max 등급표 (percentile, 6 연령군 × 남녀). Cooper Institute 코호트 기반.

section_citations.ref: Karvonen MJ, et al. Ann Med Exp Biol Fenn. 1957;35(3):307.
section_citations.note: Heart Rate Reserve(HRR) 기반 target HR 식. THR = ((HRmax-HRrest)×%)+HRrest.

section_citations.ref: Daniels JT, Gilbert J. Oxygen Power. 1979 (VDOT origin). + Daniels' Running Formula, 4th ed. 2022.
section_citations.note: VDOT pseudo-VO2max 환산표. 레이스 페이스 → 트레이닝 구간(E/M/T/I/R) 매핑.

section_citations.ref: Tanaka H, et al. JACC. 2001;37(1):153. PMID 11153730.
section_citations.note: HRmax = 208 - 0.7×age. meta-analysis 351 studies n=18,712. SEE ±7 bpm.
여성 전용 HRmax = 206 - 0.88×age. St James Women Take Heart Project n=5,437.

section_citations.ref: Mandsager K, et al. JAMA Network Open. 2018;1(6):e183605.
section_citations.note: low vs elite CRF mortality HR=5.04. CRF > smoking(1.41)·DM(1.40). n=122,007.
